---
title: "Insane Baseball Awards"
description: "The SABRhood's original, data-selected awards for baseball's strangest and most specific skills."
---

::: {.page-intro .page-intro--dark .insane-intro}
<span class="eyebrow">The SABRhood originals</span>

# Baseball's wonderfully specific trophies

Unusual skills, count-level dominance, strange player profiles, and races too
interesting to leave buried in a spreadsheet.
:::

{{< include includes/insane-awards.html >}}
